>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RGB colors only work in Terminals which support TrueColor.
The background and foreground colors can be customized individually.
Styles can also be applied. For example: Bold or Italic.
>












────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RGB colors only work in Terminals which support TrueColor.
The background and foreground colors can be customized individually.
Styles can also be applied. For example: Bold or Italic.
>












────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RGB colors only work in Terminals which support TrueColor.
The background and foreground colors can be customized individually.
Styles can also be applied. For example: Bold or Italic.
>
